fields.name: Name
fields.description: Source designation following IAU format (4FGL JHHMM.m+DDMM[c])

fields.name: RA
fields.description: Right Ascension in J2000 decimal degrees

fields.name: Dec
fields.description: Declination in J2000 decimal degrees

fields.name: LII
fields.description: Galactic Longitude derived from J2000 position

fields.name: BII
fields.description: Galactic Latitude derived from J2000 position

fields.name: Semi_Major_Axis_95
fields.description: Semi-major axis of error ellipse at 95% confidence

fields.name: Detection_Significance
fields.description: Source detection significance in Gaussian sigma units over 100 MeV to 1 TeV band

fields.name: Spectrum_Type
fields.description: Spectral model type (PowerLaw, LogParabola, PLSuperExpCutoff)

fields.name: PL_Index
fields.description: Photon index for PowerLaw fit

fields.name: Pivot_Energy
fields.description: Energy where error in differential photon flux is minimal

fields.name: Flux_1_100_GeV
fields.description: Integral photon flux for 1-100 GeV

fields.name: Energy_Flux
fields.description: Energy flux in the 100 MeV to 100 GeV range

fields.name: Variability_Index
fields.description: Sum of log(likelihood) differences between flux fitted in each time interval and average flux

fields.name: Frac_Variability
fields.description: Fractional variability computed from fluxes in each year

fields.name: Source_Type
fields.description: Primary class designation of identification or likely associated source (abbreviations include AGN, BLL, FSRQ, PSR, PWN, SNR, and others)

fields.name: Assoc_Name
fields.description: Designation of identified or likely associated source

fields.name: Assoc_Prob_Bay
fields.description: Bayesian probability of association (NULL for extended sources, 0 for sources below 0.8 threshold)

fields.name: TeVCat_Flag
fields.description: Indicates possible TeVCat association (N=No, P=Small TeV source, E=Extended TeV source)

fields.name: Data_Release
fields.description: Data release in which source was added (1=8-year, 2=10-year, 3=12-year, 4=14-year)

fields.name: Analysis_Flags
fields.description: Bit-encoded flags indicating detection or characterization issues
